title: Luminary
description: A kitchen sink modpack with a focus on exploration.
body:
**Luminary** is a Minecraft kitchen sink modpack with a focus on exploration. It makes use of popular world-gen mods such as [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith), [CTOV](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village), [Explorify](https://modrinth.com/datapack/explorify), and more to spice up your world whilst keeping it optimized using mods like [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium), [C2ME](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric), etcetera. It makes use of [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) so you don't need a server to play with friends!

# FAQ
**Q:** Will the modpack ever be available for past / future updates?\
**A:** For past updates, probably not. As for future ones, the modpack will be updated as soon as the mods in the modpack support it as well.

**Q:** Forge?\
**A:** nuh uh

**Q:** Quilt?\
**A:** maybe idk
